title: GEMglStencilOp
description: set front and back stencil test actions

messages.description: Specifies the action to take when the stencil test fails.
Specifies the action to take when the stencil test passes, but the depth test fails.
Specifies the action to take when both the stencil test and the depth test pass.

arguments.description: Specifies the action to take when the stencil test fails.
Specifies the action to take when the stencil test passes, but the depth test fails.
Specifies the action to take when both the stencil test and the depth test pass.
